title: Bootstrap a Form from a Seed Template
summary: Bootstrap a publishable SpiderFlow form from one of 5 seeded global templates (lead-gen-quiz / contact / nps / job-application / event-rsvp) in a single agent-callable step. Takes a template slug + optional customisation deltas (rename + override field labels + override logic + override hidden field defaults) and returns a published flow_id ready to embed. Phase 11+12 dry_run/confirm_token gate is handled inside. Use whenever an agent needs to spin up a working form fast: 'add an NPS survey', 'I need a contact form', 'add a quick lead-gen quiz', 'event RSVP form', 'job application form'.
